channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 12" pothole on Hyde Lane outside Ingle Nook house, 2nd March
item.description:
Received an alert that the previous reporting of this hole under 'FixMyStreet ref: 8874348' had been fixed, but the photo of the same pothole shows different

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Large pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Customer reports that the road has been closed at the location for several days. There is no visible sign of a team on site and they query what is happening. They have particular concerns around access for emergency vehicles, as the closure is directly O/S them.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole in middle of road, 2nd March
item.description:
Pot hole in middle of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Zoons Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
